Explain here what you want `VuePDF` to have. (use english)

Some considerations before submit the feature request:
* `VuePDF` is not a viewer per se, rather it is a **single-page** component to make one.
* This library is mostly for displaying features. Editing features are not supported if `pdf.js` does not do it.
* Since `pdf.js` is the core library you can use its API directly without depends on `VuePDF` which only leverage the most common features.

Please, consider reading the documentation website before requesting a feature. This a library already offers a bunch of props, events and utilities that may help you to build your viewer.
